concept: Elegant and terrifying oracle of the Malkavians
appearance: Lilith Nightshade appears in flawless reproductions of 1890s Parisian gowns, always lavender with black lace gloves and a parasol...
biography: At first glance, Lilith Nightshade appears to have stepped out of another century...
notes: This intro is designed to present Lilith as both a commanding social presence and a terrifying oracle, emphasizing the stark contrast between her polite, elegant composure and the sudden, predatory intensity that overtakes her when a vision strikes. Her visions should feel intrusive and unstoppable, with the POV adaptable to foreshadow pivotal events such as the Prince’s death, a PC’s impending sin, or the approach of a Sabbat incursion. Any player character who falls under her focused gaze should experience it as if the story itself has singled them out—an omen that could serve as either a dark blessing or a whispered curse, depending on where the chronicle leads.

merits_flaws.name: Oracular Ability
merits_flaws.description: Her Malkavian visions provide accurate, if cryptic, glimpses of future events, making her a terrifying oracle whose prophecies often come true.

merits_flaws.name: Iron Will
merits_flaws.description: Her commanding presence and mastery of her prophetic abilities have forged an unbreakable will that resists manipulation and allows her to maintain her elegant composure.

merits_flaws.name: Derangement: Haunted by Visions
merits_flaws.description: Her Malkavian madness manifests as being constantly haunted by prophetic visions that can strike at any moment, overwhelming her with intrusive glimpses of future events.

merits_flaws.name: Eerie Presence
merits_flaws.description: Her prophetic intensity and the unsettling nature of her visions can make others uncomfortable, sensing the deeper truths she channels and the weight of what she sees.
